title: dysoxylum perryanum
intro: Dysoxylum perryanum, a plant species native to the Himalayan region, is a type of medicinal tree belonging to the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Mahogany family. The plant's bark and leaves have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum perryanum include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant can be used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
